stemHtml: Explain the effect of a stopway/clearway on the allowed take-off mass and appropriate V<sub>1</sub> when using an unbalanced field.

options.a: If there is a clearway and no stopway the take-off mass must be lower than the balanced field take-off mass, and the appropriate V<sub>1</sub> needs to be higher than V<sub>1 </sub>balanced.
options.b: If there is a stopway and no clearway the take-off mass can be higher than the balanced field take-off mass, and the appropriate V<sub>1</sub> needs to be higher than V<sub>1 </sub>balanced.
options.c: If there is a clearway and no stopway the take-off mass can be higher than the balanced field take-off mass, and the appropriate V<sub>1</sub> needs to be higher than V<sub>1 </sub>balanced.
options.d: If there is a stopway and no clearway the take-off mass must be lower than the balanced field take-off mass, and the appropriate V<sub>1</sub> needs to be lower than V<sub>1</sub> balanced.
